title: scrophularia alata subsp. neesii
intro: Scrophularia alata subsp. neesii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the figwort family, known for its unique, winged leaves and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia alata subsp. neesii include its potential to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
